new_decisions.title: Next.js 16 proxy convention (not middleware)
new_decisions.summary: src/proxy.ts with export function proxy is the correct Next.js 16 convention. middleware.ts with export function middleware is deprecated. Codemod: npx @next/codemod@latest middleware-to-proxy .

new_decisions.title: IP resolution via x-forwarded-for (not request.ip)
new_decisions.summary: request.ip was removed in Next.js 16. The official replacement is @vercel/functions ipAddress() but that package is not in this project. x-forwarded-for header is the correct no-dep approach, consistent with existing webhook route.ts line 49.

new_patterns.title: Rate limiting: in-memory sliding window in proxy.ts
new_patterns.summary: Module-level Map<string, number[]> in src/proxy.ts. Key = pathname:ip. Timestamps filtered to window. Bounded by limit per key. Per-replica only (no Redis). Config: RATE_LIMITS record maps pathname to {limit, windowMs}.
